<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="th">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>TLS for Nurse — รายชื่อผู้เข้าร่วมอบรม</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Sarabun:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --navy:#0f2549;--teal:#0a7b6a;--gold:#b8960c;--cream:#fdf6e3;
  --a:#1a56db;--a-bg:#e8f0fe;--a-border:#c7d2fe;
  --b:#059669;--b-bg:#d1fae5;--b-border:#6ee7b7;
  --red:#dc2626;--red-bg:#fee2e2;
  --purple:#7c3aed;--purple-bg:#ede9fe;
  --text:#1a1a2e;--muted:#6b7280;--border:#e5e7eb;--surface:#fff;--page:#f1f4f8;
}
body{font-family:'Sarabun',sans-serif;background:var(--page);min-height:100vh;color:var(--text)}
.app{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding-bottom:4rem}
.banner{width:100%;display:block;border-radius:0 0 20px 20px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.18)}
.stats-bar{display:flex;background:var(--navy);overflow:hidden;flex-wrap:wrap}
.stat-item{flex:1;min-width:90px;text-align:center;padding:14px 10px;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)}
.stat-item:last-child{border-right:none}
.stat-num{font-size:24px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;line-height:1}
.stat-lbl{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);margin-top:4px}
.stat-item.s-a .stat-num{color:#93c5fd}
.stat-item.s-b .stat-num{color:#6ee7b7}
.controls{background:#fff;padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
.controls-row{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.search-wrap{position:relative;flex:1;min-width:200px}
.search-icon{position:absolute;left:12px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--muted);font-size:15px;pointer-events:none}
.search-input{width:100%;padding:10px 14px 10px 36px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;font-family:'Sarabun',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--text);outline:none;transition:all .15s;background:var(--page)}
.search-input:focus{border-color:var(--a);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(26,86,219,.1);background:#fff}
.search-input::placeholder{color:#bbb}
.tabs{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.tab{padding:9px 16px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:9px;background:#fff;color:var(--muted);font-family:'Sarabun',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;white-space:nowrap}
.tab:hover{border-color:#9ca3af;color:var(--text)}
.tab.t-all.active{background:var(--navy);border-color:var(--navy);color:#fff}
.tab.t-a.active{background:var(--a);border-color:var(--a);color:#fff}
.tab.t-b.active{background:var(--teal);border-color:var(--teal);color:#fff}
.legend{display:flex;gap:14px;padding:10px 16px 4px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.leg{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)}
.leg-dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%}
.content{padding:16px}
.group-block{margin-bottom:2.5rem}
.group-heading{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--border)}
.group-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:7px 20px;border-radius:22px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.3px}
.gb-a{background:var(--a-bg);color:var(--a);border:1.5px solid var(--a-border)}
.gb-b{background:var(--b-bg);color:var(--teal);border:1.5px solid var(--b-border)}
.group-meta{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted)}
.subgroup-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:12px}
.sg-card{background:var(--surface);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .15s,box-shadow .15s}
.sg-card:hover{border-color:#c7d2fe;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(26,86,219,.08)}
.sg-card-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:9px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:#fafafa}
.sg-tag-a{background:var(--a-bg);color:var(--a);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:8px}
.sg-tag-b{background:var(--b-bg);color:var(--teal);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:8px}
.sg-right{display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center}
.sg-mh{font-size:11px;background:var(--purple-bg);color:var(--purple);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-weight:600}
.sg-cnt{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}
.member-list{padding:4px 0}
.member-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:7px 14px;transition:background .1s;cursor:default}
.member-row:hover{background:#f9fafb}
.avatar{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0}
.av-mh-emg{background:#fce7f3;color:#be185d}
.av-mh{background:var(--purple-bg);color:var(--purple)}
.av-emg{background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red)}
.av-norm{background:#f3f4f6;color:#6b7280}
.m-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.m-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);line-height:1.4}
.m-hosp{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.4;margin-top:1px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.m-unit{font-size:10px;color:#bbb;line-height:1.3;margin-top:1px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.m-tags{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-top:4px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.tag{font-size:10px;padding:1px 7px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.7}
.tag-mh{background:var(--purple-bg);color:#6d28d9}
.tag-emg{background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red)}
.table-wrap{overflow-x:auto;background:#fff;border-radius:14px;border:1.5px solid var(--border)}
.part-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px}
.part-table th{background:var(--navy);color:#fff;padding:10px 14px;font-weight:600;text-align:left;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.3px}
.part-table td{padding:9px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);vertical-align:top}
.part-table tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
.part-table tr:hover td{background:#f9fafb}
.td-num{color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;width:32px}
.td-group-a{background:var(--a-bg);color:var(--a);padding:2px 9px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;display:inline-block}
.td-group-b{background:var(--b-bg);color:var(--teal);padding:2px 9px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;display:inline-block}
.td-sub-a{color:var(--a);font-weight:700;font-size:12px}
.td-sub-b{color:var(--teal);font-weight:700;font-size:12px}
.no-result{text-align:center;padding:3rem 1rem;color:var(--muted);font-size:15px}
footer{text-align:center;padding:2rem;font-size:12px;color:#bbb}
@media(max-width:600px){
  .tabs .tab{padding:8px 10px;font-size:12px}
  .stat-num{font-size:18px}
  .subgroup-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="banner" alt="TLS for Nurse Banner">
  <div class="stats-bar">
    <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">90</div><div class="stat-lbl">ผู้เข้าร่วมทั้งหมด</div></div>
    <div class="stat-item s-a"><div class="stat-num">45</div><div class="stat-lbl">กลุ่ม A (A1–A11)</div></div>
    <div class="stat-item s-b"><div class="stat-num">45</div><div class="stat-lbl">กลุ่ม B (B1–B11)</div></div>
    <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">22</div><div class="stat-lbl">กลุ่มย่อย</div></div>
    <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">20+</div><div class="stat-lbl">โรงพยาบาล</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="controls">
    <div class="controls-row">
      <div class="search-wrap">
        <span class="search-icon">🔍</span>
        <input class="search-input" id="search" type="text" placeholder="ค้นหาชื่อ, โรงพยาบาล, กลุ่ม..." oninput="render()">
      </div>
      <div class="tabs">
        <button class="tab t-all active" id="tab-all" onclick="setTab('all')">ทั้งหมด</button>
        <button class="tab t-a" id="tab-a" onclick="setTab('a')">🔵 กลุ่ม A</button>
        <button class="tab t-b" id="tab-b" onclick="setTab('b')">🟢 กลุ่ม B</button>
        <button class="tab t-all" id="tab-list" onclick="setTab('list')">📋 รายชื่อทั้งหมด</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="legend">
    <span class="leg"><span class="leg-dot" style="background:#a855f7"></span>สมาชิก รพ.มหาราชฯ</span>
    <span class="leg"><span class="leg-dot" style="background:#dc2626"></span>งานฉุกเฉิน/ER</span>
    <span class="leg"><span class="leg-dot" style="background:#be185d"></span>มหาราชฯ+ฉุกเฉิน</span>
  </div>
  <div class="content" id="main-content"></div>
  <footer>TLS for Nurse 2569 — Trauma Excellence Center รพ.มหาราชนครราชสีมา</footer>
</div>
<script>
const DATA = [{"name":"นางสาว สุภัสรา สอนอินทร์","unit":"หน่วยผ่าตัดกระดูกและข้อ (OR ORTHO)","hospital":"รพ.มหาราชนครราชสีมา","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม A","subGroup":"A1","isEmergency":false,"isMaharaj":true},{"name":"นางสาว ศิวพร สู้ศึก","unit":"หผป.กระดูกและข้อชาย-สงฆ์ 8 ขวา","hospital":"รพ.มหาราชนครราชสีมา","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม A","subGroup":"A1","isEmergency":false,"isMaharaj":true},{"name":"นาย ธวัชชัย ชื่นบุญ","unit":"-","hospital":"รพ.ชุมพวง","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม A","subGroup":"A1","isEmergency":true,"isMaharaj":false},{"name":"นางสาว สมฤดี บุญมีเขว้า","unit":"หผป.ศัลยกรรมระบบประสาท (ศป)","hospital":"รพ.มหาราชนครราชสีมา","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม A","subGroup":"A2","isEmergency":false,"isMaharaj":true},{"name":"นางสาว ทิวา นอกลาง","unit":"ศัลยกรรมชาย 5 ซ้าย","hospital":"รพ.มหาราชนครราชสีมา","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม A","subGroup":"A2","isEmergency":false,"isMaharaj":true},{"name":"นางสาว จุฑาวรรณ เจริญภูมิ","unit":"งานอุบัติเหตุฉุกเฉินและนิติเวช","hospital":"รพ.บัวลาย","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม Trauma)","hospital":"รพ.มหาราชนครราชสีมา","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม A","subGroup":"A5","isEmergency":true,"isMaharaj":true},{"name":"นางสาว สุลัดดา อาจดี","unit":"-","hospital":"รพ.ชุมพวง","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม A","subGroup":"A5","isEmergency":false,"isMaharaj":false},{"name":"นางสาว อภิญญา รัตนวงศ์","unit":"ER","hospital":"รพ.โชคชัย","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม A","subGroup":"A5","isEmergency":true,"isMaharaj":false},{"name":"นางสาว เบญจมาพร บัวนา","unit":"การพยาบาลอุบัติเหตุและฉุกเฉิน","hospital":"รพ.มหาราชนครราชสีมา","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม A","subGroup":"A7","isEmergency":false,"isMaharaj":true},{"name":"นางสาว จุฑามาศ ไชยณรงค์","unit":"ห้องฉุกเฉิน รพ.โนนแดง","hospital":"รพ.โนนแดง","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม A","subGroup":"A7","isEmergency":false,"isMaharaj":false},{"name":"นางสาว ศิวตา ผาดไธสง","unit":"ศูนย์รับส่งต่อ","hospital":"รพ.มหาราชนครราชสีมา","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม 4","hospital":"รพ.มหาราชนครราชสีมา","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม A","subGroup":"A8","isEmergency":false,"isMaharaj":true},{"name":"นาย ปฏิพัทธ์ ค้ากระบือ","unit":"งานการพยาบาลผู้ป่วยอุบัติเหตุฉุกเฉินและนิติเวช","hospital":"รพ.โนนไทย","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม A","subGroup":"A8","isEmergency":true,"isMaharaj":false},{"name":"นางสาว นิภัทรา A","subGroup":"A9","isEmergency":false,"isMaharaj":false},{"name":"นางสาว กิติยา บุญศักดิ์","unit":"หผป.พิเศษศัลยกรรม ฉก.5","hospital":"รพ.มหาราชนครราชสีมา","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม A","subGroup":"A10","isEmergency":false,"isMaharaj":true},{"name":"นางสาว กฤติมา ปรุงกระโทก","unit":"หผป.ศัลยกรรมอุบัติเหตุหญิง ชั้น 9","hospital":"รพ.มหาราชนครราชสีมา","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม ประทีปรัตน์","unit":"งานอุบัติเหตุฉุกเแินและนิติเวช","hospital":"รพ.บัวลาย","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม B","subGroup":"B11","isEmergency":true,"isMaharaj":false},{"name":"นางสาว ยุพวดี สีหานอก","unit":"ER","hospital":"รพ.โนนสูง","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม B","subGroup":"B11","isEmergency":true,"isMaharaj":false},{"name":"นาง รุ่งนภา มูลสมบัติ","unit":"อุบัติเหตุ-ฉุกเฉิน","hospital":"รพ.เซนต์เมรี่","mainGroup":"กลุ่ม B","subGroup":"B11","isEmergency":true,"isMaharaj":false}];

let currentTab='all';
function setTab(t){
  currentTab=t;
  ['all','a','b','list'].forEach(x=>{
    const el=document.getElementById('tab-'+x);
    if(!el) return;
    const base='tab t-'+(x==='list'?'all':x);
    el.className=base+(x===t?' active':'');
  });
  render();
}
function initials(name){
  const p=name.split(' ');
  if(p.length>=3) return p[1].charAt(0)+(p[2]?p[2].charAt(0):'');
  return p[p.length-1].charAt(0);
}
function avClass(p){
  if(p.isMaharaj&&p.isEmergency) return 'av-mh-emg';
  if(p.isMaharaj) return 'av-mh';
  if(p.isEmergency) return 'av-emg';
  return 'av-norm';
}
function hl(text,q){
  if(!q) return text;
  const re=new RegExp('('+q.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g,'\\$&')+')','gi');
  return text.replace(re,'<mark style="background:#fef08a;border-radius:3px;padding:0 2px">$1</mark>');
}
function render(){
  const q=document.getElementById('search').value.toLowerCase().trim();
  const container=document.getElementById('main-content');
  if(currentTab==='list'){renderTable(q,container);return;}
  const groups={'กลุ่ม A':{},'กลุ่ม B':{}};
  DATA.forEach(p=>{
    if(currentTab==='a'&&p.mainGroup!=='กลุ่ม A') return;
    if(currentTab==='b'&&p.mainGroup!=='กลุ่ม B') return;
    if(q&&!p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)&&!p.hospital.toLowerCase().includes(q)&&!p.subGroup.toLowerCase().includes(q)&&!p.unit.toLowerCase().includes(q)) return;
    if(!groups[p.mainGroup][p.subGroup]) groups[p.mainGroup][p.subGroup]=[];
    groups[p.mainGroup][p.subGroup].push(p);
  });
  const showGroups=currentTab==='b'?['กลุ่ม B']:currentTab==='a'?['กลุ่ม A']:['กลุ่ม A','กลุ่ม B'];
  let html='',total=0;
  showGroups.forEach(g=>{
    const sgs=groups[g],isA=g==='กลุ่ม A';
    const keys=Object.keys(sgs);
    if(!keys.length) return;
    const cnt=Object.values(sgs).flat().length;
    total+=cnt;
    html+=`<div class="group-block"><div class="group-heading"><div class="group-badge ${isA?'gb-a':'gb-b'}">${isA?'🔵':'🟢'} ${g}</div><span class="group-meta">${cnt} คน — ${keys.length} กลุ่มย่อย</span></div><div class="subgroup-grid">`;
    keys.sort((a,b)=>parseInt(a.replace(/\D/g,''))-parseInt(b.replace(/\D/g,''))).forEach(sg=>{
      const members=sgs[sg],mh=members.filter(m=>m.isMaharaj).length;
      html+=`<div class="sg-card"><div class="sg-card-head"><span class="${isA?'sg-tag-a':'sg-tag-b'}">${sg}</span><div class="sg-right">${mh?`<span class="sg-mh">มหาราชฯ ${mh}</span>`:''}<span class="sg-cnt">${members.length} คน</span></div></div><div class="member-list">`;
      members.forEach(p=>{
        html+=`<div class="member-row"><div class="avatar ${avClass(p)}">${initials(p.name)}</div><div class="m-info"><div class="m-name">${hl(p.name,q)}</div><div class="m-hosp">${hl(p.hospital,q)}</div>${p.unit&&p.unit!=='-'?`<div class="m-unit">${p.unit}</div>`:''}<div class="m-tags">${p.isMaharaj?'<span class="tag tag-mh">มหาราชฯ</span>':''}${p.isEmergency?'<span class="tag tag-emg">ฉุกเฉิน</span>':''}</div></div></div>`;
      });
      html+=`</div></div>`;
    });
    html+=`</div></div>`;
  });
  if(!total) html='<div class="no-result">🔍 ไม่พบรายชื่อที่ค้นหา</div>';
  container.innerHTML=html;
}
function renderTable(q,container){
  let filtered=DATA.filter(p=>{
    if(!q) return true;
    return p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)||p.hospital.toLowerCase().includes(q)||p.subGroup.toLowerCase().includes(q)||p.mainGroup.toLowerCase().includes(q)||p.unit.toLowerCase().includes(q);
  });
  if(!filtered.length){container.innerHTML='<div class="no-result">🔍 ไม่พบรายชื่อที่ค้นหา</div>';return;}
  filtered.sort((a,b)=>{
    if(a.mainGroup!==b.mainGroup) return a.mainGroup.localeCompare(b.mainGroup);
    return parseInt(a.subGroup.replace(/\D/g,''))-parseInt(b.subGroup.replace(/\D/g,''));
  });
  let html=`<div class="table-wrap"><table class="part-table"><thead><tr><th>#</th><th>ชื่อ-สกุล</th><th>โรงพยาบาล</th><th>กลุ่มหลัก</th><th>กลุ่มย่อย</th></tr></thead><tbody>`;
  filtered.forEach((p,i)=>{
    const isA=p.mainGroup==='กลุ่ม A';
    html+=`<tr><td class="td-num">${i+1}</td><td><div style="font-weight:600;font-size:13px">${hl(p.name,q)}</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:#9ca3af;margin-top:2px">${p.isMaharaj?'<span class="tag tag-mh" style="margin-right:4px">มหาราชฯ</span>':''}${p.isEmergency?'<span class="tag tag-emg">ฉุกเฉิน</span>':''}</div></td><td><div style="font-size:13px">${hl(p.hospital,q)}</div>${p.unit&&p.unit!=='-'?`<div style="font-size:11px;color:#bbb;margin-top:2px">${p.unit}</div>`:''}</td><td><span class="${isA?'td-group-a':'td-group-b'}">${p.mainGroup}</span></td><td class="${isA?'td-sub-a':'td-sub-b'}">${hl(p.subGroup,q)}</td></tr>`;
  });
  html+=`</tbody></table></div>`;
  container.innerHTML=html;
}
render();
</script>
</body>
</html>
